form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 320m. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (22.94) at big odds over 400m at Maitland. Drawn close to the inside. Must be included.

form.formComment: Comes off a (18.16) win last time, scoring by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5 over 320m at this track. Has never missed the frame from five starts from the draw, including a win. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 5th over 401m at this track beaten 10 lengths (23.68) behind Ray's Beauty in a Grade 5 on April 8. Has a slick 18.27 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.
